---
title: "Example: Logistic nested bootstrap CV (template)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Load generic functions
source("R/20_cv_logit.R")

# Libraries required by the engine
library(MuMIn)
library(pROC)
library(ResourceSelection)

set.seed(1)

n <- 60
df <- data.frame(
  x1 = rnorm(n),
  x2 = rnorm(n)
)

# Generate a binary outcome from a logistic model (toy)
linpred <- -0.2 + 0.9 * df$x1 - 0.5 * df$x2
p <- 1 / (1 + exp(-linpred))
df$y <- rbinom(n, size = 1, prob = p)

model_formulas <- list(
  "Model 1" = y ~ x1,
  "Model 2" = y ~ x2,
  "Model 3" = y ~ x1 + x2
)

res <- nested_bootstrap_CV_logit(
  data = df,
  model_formulas = model_formulas,
  region_label = "toy_logit",
  outcome_var = "y",
  B = 50,     # small for demo; increase in real use
  seed = 123
)

res$ci
res$SelectionFreq
